svg.title: SMC Long Setup: Liquidity Sweep + Break of Structure
svg.desc: Candlestick diagram showing a bullish SMC setup with equal lows, liquidity sweep, and bullish break of structure
svg.text: Long setup — Liquidity sweep + Bullish BoS
① Equal lows vormen liquiditeitszone ② Sweep onder EQL ③ Bullish BoS → Long entry
